# 🌌 AI MASTERMIND ALLIANCE (AIMmA)

Global System Blueprint & Full Stack UI/UX Manual

![AILCC Core Matrix](/Users/infinite27/.gemini/antigravity/brain/542d6997-c7f5-4473-a5ab-29dba653bafb/ailcc_core_matrix_1774020842873.png)

## I. Executive Synthesis

The **AI Mastermind Alliance (AIMmA)** is the ultimate realization of a globally connected, self-healing, multi-modal intelligence network. It physically bridges edge-native React dashboards, iOS biometrics, local SQLite vector stores, and an om...
